name: Crunchy Bacon Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces Bacon, crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the dressing and sugar.
2. Add the shredded cabbage (red), chopped peanuts, and crumbled bacon to the bowl.
3. Mix lightly until all ingredients are combined.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
